name: XAUUSD Breakout Alerts

on:
  schedule:
    - cron: '*/30 * * * *'   # every 30 minutes, UTC
  workflow_dispatch:          # lets you trigger it manually from the Actions tab

permissions:
  contents: write   # needed so the workflow can commit breakout_state.json back

jobs:
  check-breakout:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.12'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pip install requests

      - name: Check for breakout
        env:
          TG_BOT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TG_BOT_TOKEN }}
          TG_CHAT_ID: ${{ secrets.TG_CHAT_ID }}
          TG_CHAT_ID2: ${{ secrets.TG_CHAT_ID2 }}
        run: python3 breakout_alert.py

      - name: Commit updated state
        run: |
          git config user.name "breakout-bot"
          git config user.email "breakout-bot@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add breakout_state.json
          git diff --staged --quiet || git commit -m "Update breakout state [skip ci]"
          git push
